proof_rows_under_review: Runtime regression test rejects a clean review outcome that cites only a spec/intent reviewer-output for a code-producing correctness bundle.
Runtime regression test accepts a clean review outcome when required code/correctness and spec/intent reviewer-output artifacts are both present and clean.
Existing delegated review authority, reviewer-output inbox, and qualification CLI tests still pass.
touched_interface_contracts: Clean review writeback requires durable lane coverage for code-producing correctness bundles.
Reviewer-output lane classification supports explicit code/correctness and spec/intent/proof lanes plus legacy combined review ids.
Qualification smoke flows now persist required code and spec reviewer outputs before clean spec-review writeback.
Review-loop skill states missing required lane output is contaminated or blocked review truth, not NONE.
reviewer_instructions: Review only this frozen evidence snapshot and the refs it names.
Return exactly NONE or structured findings with severity, evidence refs, rationale, and suggested next action, then persist only that bounded result with record-reviewer-output.
Do not mutate mission truth, clear gates, write artifacts outside the reviewer-output inbox, call record-review-outcome, or decide mission completion.
This evidence snapshot is not a writeback capability; only the parent keeps the full review truth snapshot for record-review-outcome.
If live repo reads are necessary, the parent review-loop must keep its parent-held review truth snapshot guard active.
